strategy.notes: For GEO, prefer processed tables and series matrix files first. Do not count sample HTML, platform HTML, or the series landing page as numeric substrate.

data_access.summary: Attempt 3 did not acquire any GEO numeric or semi-numeric substrate for GSE76369. Retrieval was staged in the required GEO order starting with series matrix, then processed-table discovery, supplementary-table discovery, platform discovery, and raw archive fallback, but no remote fetches could complete in this execution environment, so no usable local file was saved.
